_metadata.description: GCP to Azure service mapping for migration assessment. Keys are normalized GCP resource type identifiers.

gcp::compute::instance.description: Virtual machines on-demand. Both support Windows/Linux, custom images, auto-scaling, and preemptible/spot instances.
gcp::compute::instance.migrationNotes: Map GCE machine types to Azure VM sizes (e.g., n2-standard-4 → Standard_D4s_v5). Use Azure Migrate for discovery and assessment.

gcp::compute::dedicatedhost.description: Host your VMs on hardware that's dedicated only to your project. Supports compliance and isolation.
gcp::compute::dedicatedhost.migrationNotes: Map sole-tenant node types to Azure Dedicated Host SKUs.

gcp::compute::batch.description: Large-scale parallel and HPC workloads through VMs or containers with built-in job scheduling and autoscaling.
gcp::compute::batch.migrationNotes: Map Cloud Batch jobs to Azure Batch pools and tasks. Both support containerized and VM-based compute.

gcp::compute::instancegroup.description: Deploys and manages groups of identical VMs with autoscaling and availability zone support.
gcp::compute::instancegroup.migrationNotes: Managed instance groups map to VMSS. Migrate autoscaling policies and health checks.

gcp::compute::gpu.description: GPU-optimized VM sizes for AI, compute-intensive, graphics-intensive, and visualization workloads.
gcp::compute::gpu.migrationNotes: Map Cloud GPU accelerator types (T4, A100, V100) to Azure NC, ND, NV series.

gcp::compute::vmwareengine.description: Redeploy and extend VMware-based enterprise workloads using Azure VMware Solution.
gcp::compute::vmwareengine.migrationNotes: VMware Engine maps directly to Azure VMware Solution. Both run VMware-validated infrastructure.

gcp::run::service.description: Managed serverless container service supporting event-driven applications, scale-to-zero, and microservices.
gcp::run::service.migrationNotes: Cloud Run services map to Azure Container Apps. Migrate Dockerfile, env vars, and scaling config.

gcp::artifactregistry::repository.description: Store container images, Docker images, Helm charts and OCI artifacts.
gcp::artifactregistry::repository.migrationNotes: Migrate container images from Artifact Registry to ACR using docker pull/push or az acr import.

gcp::container::cluster.description: Deploy orchestrated containerized applications with Kubernetes. Provides cluster management and monitoring.
gcp::container::cluster.migrationNotes: Migrate GKE manifests, Helm charts, and workloads to AKS. Map node pools, autoscalers, and network policies.

gcp::functions::function.description: Integrate systems and run back-end processes in response to events or schedules without provisioning servers.
gcp::functions::function.migrationNotes: Map Cloud Function triggers (HTTP, Pub/Sub, Storage) to Azure Function triggers (HTTP, Service Bus, Blob).

gcp::appengine::application.description: Managed hosting platform for deploying and scaling web applications and services.
gcp::appengine::application.migrationNotes: Map App Engine configs (app.yaml) to Azure App Service configuration. Migrate runtime settings and env vars.

gcp::apigee::api.description: Managed service for publishing APIs to external and internal consumers.
gcp::apigee::api.migrationNotes: Migrate Apigee proxy configurations, policies, and API products to Azure API Management.

gcp::storage::bucket.description: Object storage for cloud applications, content distribution, backup, archiving, and big data analytics.
gcp::storage::bucket.migrationNotes: Map GCS storage classes (Standard, Nearline, Coldline, Archive) to Azure tiers (Hot, Cool, Cold, Archive). Use AzCopy or Azure Data Factory for bulk transfer.

gcp::compute::disk.description: SSD storage optimized for I/O-intensive read and write operations providing high-performance VM storage.
gcp::compute::disk.migrationNotes: Map Persistent Disk types (pd-standard, pd-ssd, pd-balanced) to Azure Disk types (Standard HDD, Premium SSD, Standard SSD).

gcp::filestore::instance.description: File-based storage with NFS and SMB protocol support.
gcp::filestore::instance.migrationNotes: Migrate Filestore instances to Azure Files (SMB/NFS) or Azure NetApp Files for high-performance needs.

gcp::transfer::appliance.description: Petabyte-scale data transport using secure storage devices for large data transfers to/from cloud.
gcp::transfer::appliance.migrationNotes: Transfer Appliance maps to Azure Data Box. Both provide physical devices for bulk data migration.

gcp::sql::instance.azureService: Azure SQL Database / Azure Database for MySQL/PostgreSQL
gcp::sql::instance.description: Managed relational database service handling resiliency, security, scale, and maintenance.
gcp::sql::instance.migrationNotes: Cloud SQL for SQL Server → Azure SQL Database. Cloud SQL for MySQL → Azure Database for MySQL. Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL → Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

gcp::spanner::instance.azureService: Azure Cosmos DB / Azure Database for PostgreSQL (Elastic)
gcp::spanner::instance.description: Globally distributed database that scales horizontally. Supports multiple data models and APIs.
gcp::spanner::instance.migrationNotes: Cloud Spanner's relational model maps partially to Cosmos DB (NoSQL) or PostgreSQL Elastic (sharded relational). Evaluate data model compatibility.

gcp::bigtable::instance.azureService: Azure Table Storage / Azure Cosmos DB for Table
gcp::bigtable::instance.description: Highly scalable NoSQL key-value store for semistructured datasets with flexible data schemas.
gcp::bigtable::instance.migrationNotes: Cloud Bigtable → Azure Table Storage (simple) or Cosmos DB for Table (global distribution). Consider data access patterns.

gcp::firestore::database.description: Globally distributed, multimodel database natively supporting key-value, documents, graphs, and columnar.
gcp::firestore::database.migrationNotes: Firestore document model maps well to Cosmos DB NoSQL API. Migrate collections and indexes.

gcp::memorystore::instance.description: Secure data cache and messaging broker providing high-throughput and low-latency data access.
gcp::memorystore::instance.migrationNotes: Memorystore for Redis → Azure Cache for Redis. Migrate connection strings and cache configurations.

gcp::bigquery::dataset.azureService: Microsoft Fabric Data Warehouse / Azure Databricks
gcp::bigquery::dataset.description: Cloud analytics and data warehousing using distributed processing for large-scale SQL queries.
gcp::bigquery::dataset.migrationNotes: BigQuery → Fabric Data Warehouse (SQL-based) or Azure Databricks (Spark-based). Migrate datasets, queries, and scheduled jobs.

gcp::datafusion::instance.description: Processes and moves data between compute and storage services with pipeline orchestration.
gcp::datafusion::instance.migrationNotes: Cloud Data Fusion pipelines → Azure Data Factory pipelines. Map CDAP plugins to ADF activities.

gcp::dataproc::cluster.description: Managed Apache Spark-based analytics platform for big data processing.
gcp::dataproc::cluster.migrationNotes: Dataproc Spark jobs → Azure Databricks notebooks/jobs. Migrate Hadoop/Spark configurations.

gcp::dataflow::job.description: Managed platform for streaming and batch data processing using Apache Beam.
gcp::dataflow::job.migrationNotes: Dataflow (Apache Beam) → Azure Databricks or HDInsight. Re-implement pipelines using Spark Structured Streaming.

gcp::looker::instance.description: BI tools that build visualizations, perform on-demand analysis, and develop business insights.
gcp::looker::instance.migrationNotes: Migrate Looker dashboards and data models to Power BI reports and datasets.

gcp::dataexplorer::cluster.description: Managed low-latency big data analytics platform for log and time series data at petabyte scale.
gcp::dataexplorer::cluster.migrationNotes: BigQuery time series workloads → Azure Data Explorer or Fabric Real-Time Intelligence.

gcp::aiplatform::model.description: Cloud service that trains, deploys, automates, and manages machine learning and foundation models.
gcp::aiplatform::model.migrationNotes: Vertex AI → Azure Machine Learning. Migrate training pipelines, model registry, and endpoints.

gcp::aiplatform::endpoint.description: Deploy machine learning models as web services for real-time or batch predictions at scale.
gcp::aiplatform::endpoint.migrationNotes: Vertex AI predictions → Azure ML managed online/batch endpoints.

gcp::language::model.description: Managed service for natural language processing applications — sentiment, key phrases, entity recognition.
gcp::language::model.migrationNotes: Natural Language AI → Azure AI Language. Map entity extraction, sentiment, and classification APIs.

gcp::speech::recognizer.description: Transcribe audio to text in 100+ languages with custom model support.
gcp::speech::recognizer.migrationNotes: Speech-to-Text API → Azure Speech to Text. Migrate custom models and audio pipelines.

gcp::dialogflow::agent.azureService: Microsoft Bot Framework / Azure Language QA
gcp::dialogflow::agent.description: Build conversational AI experiences and integrate conversational UI.
gcp::dialogflow::agent.migrationNotes: Dialogflow agents → Bot Framework + Azure Language question answering. Migrate intents, entities, and fulfillment logic.

gcp::aiplatform::genai.description: Prebuilt large language models (LLMs) available via API endpoints.
gcp::aiplatform::genai.migrationNotes: Gemini model family → Azure OpenAI (GPT-4, GPT-4o). Migrate prompts, fine-tuning, and API integrations.

gcp::aiplatform::agent.description: Build custom AI agents in the cloud with tool use and multi-step reasoning.
gcp::aiplatform::agent.migrationNotes: Vertex AI Agent Builder → Foundry Agent Service. Migrate agent configurations and grounding data.

gcp::pubsub::topic.azureService: Azure Service Bus / Azure Event Grid
gcp::pubsub::topic.description: Cloud-based message-oriented middleware with reliable message queuing and publish/subscribe messaging.
gcp::pubsub::topic.migrationNotes: Pub/Sub → Service Bus (queuing/topics) or Event Grid (event routing). Map subscriptions and dead-letter configs.

gcp::pubsub::subscription.description: Real-time data ingestion and microbatching service for building dynamic data pipelines.
gcp::pubsub::subscription.migrationNotes: High-throughput Pub/Sub streaming → Event Hubs. Migrate consumer groups and partition strategies.

gcp::vpc::network.description: Isolated, private environment in the cloud with control over IP ranges, subnets, route tables, and gateways.
gcp::vpc::network.migrationNotes: VPC → Azure VNet. Map subnets, firewall rules → NSGs, routes → UDRs. Plan IP address space.

gcp::dns::managedzone.description: Manage DNS records using the same credentials and billing as other cloud services.
gcp::dns::managedzone.migrationNotes: Cloud DNS zones → Azure DNS zones. Export and import DNS records. Update registrar nameservers.

gcp::compute::interconnect.description: Private network connection from on-premises to cloud, not over the internet.
gcp::compute::interconnect.migrationNotes: Cloud Interconnect → ExpressRoute. Engage connectivity partners and plan circuit provisioning.

gcp::compute::vpngateway.description: Connects virtual networks to on-premises networks via VPN tunneling (site-to-site and point-to-site).
gcp::compute::vpngateway.migrationNotes: Cloud VPN → Azure VPN Gateway. Migrate tunnel configurations, shared keys, and BGP settings.

gcp::compute::loadbalancer.azureService: Azure Load Balancer / Azure Application Gateway
gcp::compute::loadbalancer.description: Layer-4 TCP/UDP load balancing and Layer-7 application load balancing with SSL termination.
gcp::compute::loadbalancer.migrationNotes: Network LB → Azure Load Balancer (L4). HTTP(S) LB → Azure Application Gateway (L7) or Azure Front Door (global).

gcp::compute::cdn.description: Distributed network of servers for efficient web content delivery to users.
gcp::compute::cdn.migrationNotes: Cloud CDN → Azure CDN. Migrate origin configs, caching rules, and custom domains.

gcp::compute::firewall.description: Managed cloud-based network security service protecting virtual network resources.
gcp::compute::firewall.migrationNotes: VPC firewall rules → NSGs (subnet/NIC level) or Azure Firewall (centralized). Map allow/deny rules.

gcp::compute::armor.description: Centralized protection of web applications from common exploits and vulnerabilities.
gcp::compute::armor.migrationNotes: Cloud Armor policies → Azure WAF policies on Application Gateway or Front Door.

gcp::compute::nat.description: Outbound network address translation (NAT) for virtual networks' internet connectivity.
gcp::compute::nat.migrationNotes: Cloud NAT → Azure NAT Gateway. Configure on target subnets with public IP prefixes.

gcp::servicenetworking::connection.description: Private access to PaaS services over a private endpoint in your virtual network.
gcp::servicenetworking::connection.migrationNotes: Private Service Connect → Azure Private Link/Private Endpoints. Configure DNS and network routing.

gcp::iam::serviceaccount.description: Enterprise identity service providing SSO, MFA, and central management of identities.
gcp::iam::serviceaccount.migrationNotes: GCP service accounts → Azure Managed Identities. Map IAM bindings to Azure RBAC role assignments.

gcp::iam::role.description: Manage who has access to resources, what they can do, and what areas they have access to.
gcp::iam::role.migrationNotes: GCP IAM roles → Azure RBAC roles. Map project-level bindings to resource group/subscription assignments.

gcp::kms::keyring.description: Security solution to manage, create, and control encryption keys stored in HSMs.
gcp::kms::keyring.migrationNotes: Cloud KMS → Azure Key Vault. Migrate keys, secrets, and certificates. Update application references.

gcp::secretmanager::secret.description: Securely store and manage secrets, API keys, and connection strings.
gcp::secretmanager::secret.migrationNotes: Secret Manager → Azure Key Vault secrets. Migrate secret values and rotation policies.

gcp::securitycommandcenter::source.description: Cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP) for cloud-based application security.
gcp::securitycommandcenter::source.migrationNotes: Security Command Center → Microsoft Defender for Cloud. Migrate security policies and alert configurations.

gcp::chronicle::instance.description: Cloud-native SIEM platform using AI to analyze large volumes of security data.
gcp::chronicle::instance.migrationNotes: Google Security Operations (Chronicle) → Microsoft Sentinel. Migrate detection rules and playbooks.

gcp::monitoring::alertpolicy.description: Collect, analyze, and act on telemetry from cloud and on-premises environments.
gcp::monitoring::alertpolicy.migrationNotes: Cloud Monitoring → Azure Monitor. Migrate dashboards, alert policies, and uptime checks.

gcp::logging::logbucket.description: Real-time log management and analysis service.
gcp::logging::logbucket.migrationNotes: Cloud Logging → Log Analytics. Migrate log sinks, filters, and log-based metrics.

gcp::trace::trace.description: Application performance management (APM) for live web applications.
gcp::trace::trace.migrationNotes: Cloud Trace/Profiler → Application Insights. Instrument apps with Azure Monitor SDK.

gcp::billing::account.description: Generate, monitor, forecast, and share billing data for resource usage.
gcp::billing::account.migrationNotes: Cloud Billing → Microsoft Cost Management. Set up budgets, alerts, and cost analysis views.

gcp::cloudbuild::trigger.description: Managed build service supporting CI/CD pipelines.
gcp::cloudbuild::trigger.migrationNotes: Cloud Build → Azure Pipelines or GitHub Actions. Migrate build configs (cloudbuild.yaml) to pipeline YAML.

gcp::sourcerepo::repository.description: Cloud service for collaborating on code development.
gcp::sourcerepo::repository.migrationNotes: Cloud Source Repositories → Azure Repos or GitHub. Git push to new remote.

gcp::deploymentmanager::deployment.description: Automate manual, long-running, error-prone, and frequently repeated IT tasks.
gcp::deploymentmanager::deployment.migrationNotes: Deployment Manager templates → Bicep/ARM templates or Terraform. Re-implement IaC.

gcp::iot::registry.azureService: Azure IoT Hub / Azure Event Grid MQTT
gcp::iot::registry.description: Gateway for managing bidirectional communication with IoT devices securely and at scale.
gcp::iot::registry.migrationNotes: IoT Core (deprecated) → Azure IoT Hub or Event Grid MQTT broker. Migrate device registry and telemetry flows.

gcp::iot::device.azureService: Azure IoT Edge / Azure IoT Operations
gcp::iot::device.description: Deploy cloud intelligence directly on IoT devices for on-premises scenarios.
gcp::iot::device.migrationNotes: Edge TPU workloads → Azure IoT Edge. Deploy ML models and processing at the edge.

gcp::composer::environment.azureService: Azure Logic Apps / Azure Data Factory
gcp::composer::environment.description: Serverless technology connecting apps, data, and devices with SaaS and cloud-based connectors.
gcp::composer::environment.migrationNotes: Cloud Composer (Airflow) → Azure Data Factory for ETL or Logic Apps for workflow orchestration.

gcp::dataplex::lake.description: Data governance, data security, and risk/compliance solutions portfolio.
gcp::dataplex::lake.migrationNotes: Dataplex Universal Catalog → Microsoft Purview. Migrate data catalogs and governance policies.

gcp::search::index.description: Full-text search and related search analytics and capabilities.
gcp::search::index.migrationNotes: Cloud Search → Azure AI Search. Migrate indexes, data sources, and indexers.

gcp::anthos::cluster.description: Simplify complex distributed environments across on-premises, edge, and multicloud.
gcp::anthos::cluster.migrationNotes: Anthos → Azure Arc. Arc-enable existing Kubernetes clusters and servers for unified management.

gcp::gaming::server.description: Managed services for hosting dedicated game servers.
gcp::gaming::server.migrationNotes: Google Game Servers → Azure PlayFab. Migrate server configurations and matchmaking rules.

gcp::workspace::domain.description: Fully integrated cloud service providing communications, email, and document management.
gcp::workspace::domain.migrationNotes: Google Workspace → Microsoft 365. Migrate email, Drive files, and collaboration tools.

gcp::migrate::assessment.description: Server assessment and migration tool for discovering and assessing environments.
gcp::migrate::assessment.migrationNotes: Migrate to Google Cloud → Azure Migrate. Use for VM discovery, assessment, and migration planning.

gcp::dms::migrationjob.description: Managed service for migrating databases with minimal downtime.
gcp::dms::migrationjob.migrationNotes: Database Migration Service → Azure DMS. Plan schema and data migration with minimal downtime.
